source_pr.title: executor,util/testkit: fix data race in test TestOnlyFullGroupBy
source_pr.body: It should use `MustQuery` rather than `MustExec`, so `result.Close()` would be called.

symptoms: executor,util/testkit: fix data race in test TestOnlyFullGroupBy | tk.MustQuery("select c from t group by c,d order by d") (executor/aggregate_test.go)
failure_signature: executor,util/testkit: fix data race in test TestOnlyFullGroupBy | tk.MustQuery("select c from t group by c,d order by d") (executor/aggregate_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to cleanup/resource handling: using `MustExec` for SELECT statements returned a non-nil result set that was never closed, which can leak goroutines/resources and trigger race detector failures in the unit test suite. This PR stabilizes it by switching SELECTs to `MustQuery` (so Close() is called) and making `MustExec` close any returned result automatically.
fix_pattern: Ensure SELECT recordsets are always closed (use MustQuery for SELECT; make MustExec close returned results) to avoid goroutine leaks and race issues.

evidence: evidence: executor,util/testkit: fix data race in test TestOnlyFullGroupBy | tk.MustQuery("select c from t group by c,d order by d") (executor/aggregate_test.go)
